product_overview: Vastra CRM is a role-based scheme management app for customers, staff, and administrators. It supports phone-based authentication, customer enrollment, installment tracking, scheme fulfillment, and downloadable transaction documents.
core_goals: Let users sign in with phone-based OTP or PIN/biometric access
Allow staff to enroll customers and record monthly deposits
Allow admins to manage schemes and monitor customer activity
Provide downloadable PDFs and CSV exports for financial records
Support scheme fulfillment flows that confirm customer authorization

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Users can authenticate with a phone number and OTP, or use PIN/biometric access when enrolled.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter phone number -> Request login code -> Navigate to /otp-verify -> Enter OTP -> Access the authenticated area
Navigate to /pin-login -> Use enrolled PIN or biometric access -> Access the authenticated area
Navigate to /login -> Enter invalid phone number format -> Attempt to continue -> See validation feedback
Navigate to /otp-verify -> Enter incorrect OTP -> Submit verification -> See access denied feedback

features.name: Admin Scheme Management
features.description: Administrators can manage customer scheme activity from the admin dashboard, including scheme setup, payment recording, reporting, and exports.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> View active customers -> Create a new scheme plan -> Record a monthly payment -> See updated scheme activity
Navigate to /admin -> Download a customer report as PDF -> Receive the report file
Navigate to /admin -> Export transaction data as CSV -> Receive the export file

features.name: Staff Enrollment & Fulfillment
features.description: Staff can enroll new customers, log deposits, and initiate scheme fulfillment that triggers customer OTP verification.
user_flows: Navigate to /staff -> Enroll a new customer -> Save the enrollment -> See the customer added to the system
Navigate to /staff -> Log a monthly deposit -> Save the payment -> See the deposit reflected in the account history
Navigate to /staff -> Request scheme fulfillment -> Trigger customer OTP verification -> Complete fulfillment after OTP confirmation
Navigate to /staff -> Download a receipt as PDF -> Receive the receipt file

routes.description: User login page with phone number

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login with phone number and OTP or PIN/Biometric
user_interactions: Click Login button to receive OTP
Optionally use PIN or biometric if enrolled

features.name: Admin Scheme Management
features.description: Admins can view and create investment schemes, collect installments, and view analytics
user_interactions: Click to view all active customers

features.name: Staff Enrollment & Fulfillment
features.description: Staff can enroll new customers and process scheme fulfillments via OTP
user_interactions: Request scheme fulfillment which triggers an OTP to the customer
